label: Circle of Death
notes: Massive radial burst of green corrosive energy beams, 180 deg spread of vertical lightning spears. 72 dominant.

label: White Tornado
notes: Tall contained spinning white/teal vortex column fills screen. No overflow family. Anchors 17,25,26,27 drive column shape.

label: Ride the Lightning
notes: Massive white/blue lightning columns filling entire screen, multiple branching bolts upward. Each group is a separate 245 token. Shock-themed.

label: Green Spinner
notes: Wide sweeping green energy beam with spinning/rotational motion. 5 stacked 245 blocks. Core drivers: 72+70+71 at extreme stacks.

label: The Swarm
notes: 72×164 first run, then anchor tail, then 71×190 (Express) + 72×215 second run + 70×203 (Overflow). Express+Overflow at these stacks cause grenades to spawn swarms of other grenades with their own effects. 73 capped at 5. Paired with {291:8}. Single block.

label: Spinning Monster
notes: Terra's gun recipe. 72×45 dominant, dual secondaries 39×25 + 66×25. 73 (Expansive) hard-capped at 5 by generator regardless of n:10 in source. Note: no {291:8} wrapper in original — only {298:11} anchor used.

label: Dancing Stars
notes: 72 dominant (85 stacks). Anchor trio 43×9 + 34×8 before the 72 block, then standard tail anchors. Elemental swap produces entirely new color/theme.

label: Artillery Barrage
notes: Artillery-focused: sustained bullet/missile fire from grenade. Artillery (32) dominant with Duration (53) extending fire time. Missiles (55) and Mortars (57) add homing projectiles. Ricochet (54) makes bullets bounce between enemies. Divider (30+44) spawns extra grenades that also fire.

label: Lingering Inferno
notes: Lingering-focused: rotating beams dominate with extended duration. Lingering (34) stacked heavy for multiple overlapping beam sets. Duration (21+62) extends the effect. Pulsing (63) adds elemental waves between beam rotations. Fracture (65) adds pillars. MIRV (29) splits into more lingering sources.

label: Rain of Fire
notes: Artillery + MIRV hybrid: artillery grenade fires bullets while MIRV splits spawn more artillery sources. Each MIRV child also fires artillery. Mortar (57) adds top-down bombardment. Spring (31+43) makes grenades bounce in place, firing artillery at each bounce point.

label: Vortex Cannon
notes: Singularity + Artillery hybrid: singularity pulls enemies into a kill zone, then artillery fires into the cluster. Collapsing (60) maximizes pull radius, Artillery (32) with Duration (53) sustains fire into the vortex center. Penetrator (69) ensures bullets hit stacked enemies.

label: Beam Splitter
notes: Lingering + Divider: lingering beams on the main grenade, which divides into multiple child grenades that each spawn their own beam sets. Long Division (44) + Repeater (47) maximize child count. Each child gets its own lingering zone creating a web of overlapping beams.

label: Neutron Star
notes: All three styles combined: Singularity core pulls enemies, Lingering beams cook them, Artillery fires outward. Maximum visual chaos. Each style at moderate stacks so they coexist. Expansive (73) widens the whole effect. Damage Amp (39) debuffs everything caught inside.

label: Carpet Bomb
notes: Artillery + Spring bounce: grenade bounces in place firing artillery at each point. Tightly Coiled (49) + Apex (50) maximize explosions per bounce. Compounding (51) increases damage with each bounce. Mortar (57) rains down from above while bullets fire horizontally.

label: Elemental Cascade
notes: Lingering with all elemental variants stacked. Each Lingering element (34-38) spawns its own beam color. Pulsing (63) radiates waves between beams. Splat Pack (64) leaves elemental puddles. Alchemic (66) pushes status chance to extreme. Fracture (65) adds pillars in every element.

label: Death Blossom
notes: Lingering + Artillery hybrid variant: rotating beams (34) sweep the area while artillery (32) fires outward from the same point. Duration stacks (21+53) keep both active longer. Missiles (55) home in from the artillery. Penetrator (69) crits on beam-hit targets.

label: Hailstorm
notes: Artillery + Divider rain: Repeater (47) drops grenades downward while midflight, each firing artillery. Mortar (57) adds top-down bombardment. Maglock (56) homes the main grenade to a target. Multiple 245 tokens — first token sets up dividers, second is the artillery payload.

label: Supernova
notes: Lingering + Singularity + MIRV triple threat. Singularity pulls, lingering beams activate, then MIRV splits into children that each pull and beam again. Expansive (73) and Nuke (76) make the final detonation massive. Two 245 groups: setup group then payload group.

label: Missile Swarm
notes: Missiles-dominant artillery: homing micro-missiles blanket the area. Missiles (55) stacked heavy with Maglock (56) for homing. Artillery (32) base with Duration (53) extending the barrage.

label: Bullet Hell
notes: Artillery-dominant with Ricochet: sustained bullet streams that bounce between enemies. Artillery (32) heavy, Ricochet (54) makes every bullet chain. Duration (53) extends fire time.

label: Mortar Siege
notes: Mortar-dominant: top-down bombardment. Mortar (57) stacked heavy rains projectiles from above. Artillery (32) adds horizontal fire. Missiles (55) for homing cleanup.

label: Radiation Field
notes: Radiation lingering variant: radiation beams (38) dominate. Duration stacked for extended field. Pulsing (63) adds radiation waves. Fracture (65) spawns radiation pillars.

label: Cryo Cage
notes: Cryo lingering: cryo beams (37) freeze enemies in place. Fracture (65) creates ice pillars as walls. Duration keeps the cage up. Enemies frozen inside take massive crit damage.

label: Shock Web
notes: Shock lingering: shock beams (36) arc between enemies. Splat Pack (64) creates shock puddles. Pulsing (63) emits shock waves. High status chance via Alchemic (66).

label: Critical Mass
notes: Crit-focused utility: every hit crits. Exacting (75) for crit chance, Merciless (79) for crit damage, Penetrator (69) for guaranteed crits on impacted targets. Explosive (72) for base damage amp.

label: Smart Strike
notes: Maglock-dominant artillery: homing grenades that fire artillery on contact. Maglock (56) stacked heavy for tracking. Artillery (32) fires on each hit. Duration (53) extends fire. Clean targeted damage.

label: Plasma Burst
notes: Plasma Coil signature recipe. Expansive(73) dominant — massive radius. Mixed style anchors from every grenade type.

label: Pure Explosive
notes: Explosive(72) at extreme 184 stacks with tiny anchor perks. Raw damage amplification with Overflow(70) and Express(71).

label: Artillery Hellfire
notes: Artillery dominant with extreme Mortar bombardment. Mortars rain from above while artillery fires horizontally. Missiles home on stragglers.

label: Missile Storm
notes: Missiles dominant — homing micro-missiles blanket the area. Artillery provides sustained fire between missile volleys. Ricochet chains through crowds.

label: Ricochet Barrage
notes: Ricochet dominant — artillery bullets bounce between enemies with extended duration. All stacks pumped for sustained chaos.

label: Sustained Fire
notes: Duration dominant — artillery fires for an eternity. Double duration stacks (21+53) keep it going. Divider spawns extra grenades that also fire.

label: Artillery Swarm
notes: Artillery + MIRV hybrid — each MIRV child fires its own artillery. Tightly Packed adds more children. Every child gets Duration for extended fire.

label: Maglock Artillery
notes: Maglock homing dominant — grenades seek enemies then fire artillery point-blank. Every grenade homes in before unleashing its payload.

label: Beam Nova
notes: Lingering dominant with Pulsing heavy — rotating beams + elemental pulse waves radiating outward.

label: Radiation Storm
notes: Radiation lingering (38) dominant — green radiation beams with Fracture pillars and Pulsing waves.

label: Cryo Storm
notes: Cryo lingering (37) dominant — ice beams freeze everything. Fracture creates ice walls.

label: Shock Storm
notes: Shock lingering (36) dominant — electric arcs chain between targets. Heavy Pulsing for shock waves.

label: Corrosive Flood
notes: Corrosive lingering (35) dominant — acid puddles everywhere via Splat Pack. Duration extended.

label: Eternal Flame
notes: Fire lingering (34) with MAXIMUM duration — beams last forever. Double duration stacking.

label: Fracture Cascade
notes: Fracture (65) dominant with Lingering base — massive elemental pillars erupting everywhere. MIRV multiplies pillar sources.

label: Explosive Rain
notes: Explosive dominant with Divider spawning extra grenades. Each child explodes with full force.

label: Nuke Drop
notes: Explosive + Nuke combo. Massive single hit with huge radius. Nuke capped at 5.

label: Sparkle Bomb
notes: Explosive dominant with all 5 Lingering elements as small sprinkles — rainbow sparkle on detonation.

label: Chain Explosion
notes: Explosive dominant with MIRV splitting. Each child inherits full explosive power and splits again.

label: Death Pulse
notes: Explosive dominant with Pulsing waves. Each pulse radiates a ring of explosive damage outward.

label: Firestarter
notes: Explosive + Lingering fire heavy. Explosions leave lingering fire beams that keep burning.

label: Concussion Blast
notes: Explosive + Concussive knockback. Sends enemies flying while dealing massive damage.

label: Inferno Pure
notes: Maximum Lingering beams, minimal support. Pure beam intensity.

label: Inferno Artillery
notes: Beams + heavy Mortar bombardment. Lingering fires while mortars rain.

label: Inferno Vampire
notes: Heavy Bloodthirsty + Penetrator. Beams heal you while critting everything.

label: Inferno Swarm
notes: Heavy MIRV + Pulling. Each child grenade gets singularity + beams. Swarm chaos.

label: Inferno Cascade
notes: Heavy Spring + Long Division. Bouncing beam grenades that multiply endlessly.

label: Green Monster Heavy
notes: Explosive ultra-dominant with heavy Divider spawning. Maximum grenade multiplication.

label: Green Monster Beams
notes: Explosive heavy + boosted Lingering beams. Explosions leave rotating beams behind.

label: Green Monster Mortar
notes: Explosive + heavy Mortar. Top-down bombardment mixed with ground explosions.

label: Green Monster Vortex
notes: Explosive + heavy Pulling. Explosions pull enemies in, then more explosions.

label: Green Monster Bounce
notes: Explosive + heavy Spring. Each bounce explodes with full force, bouncing grenades everywhere.

label: Golden Ring Pure
notes: Maximum Lingering for pure golden beam intensity. Duration maxed for eternal glow.

label: Golden Ring Fracture
notes: Golden beams + heavy Fracture pillars erupting from the ring.

label: Golden Ring Spawn
notes: Heavy Divider + Repeater. Ring spawns endless child grenades that each create their own rings.

label: Golden Ring Pulse
notes: Heavy Pulsing waves radiating from the golden ring. Elemental pulses fill the area.

label: Golden Ring Crit
notes: Golden beams with heavy Damage Amp + Hazardous. Everything in the ring takes amplified damage.

label: Apocalypse Corrosive
notes: Corrosive Lingering dominant — green acid fills the screen. Same structure as the Insane winner.

label: Apocalypse Shock
notes: Shock Lingering dominant — blue lightning fills the screen. Same structure as the Insane winner.

label: Apocalypse Cryo
notes: Cryo Lingering dominant — ice crystal fills the screen. Same structure as the Insane winner.

label: Apocalypse Radiation
notes: Radiation Lingering dominant — purple glow fills the screen. Same structure as the Insane winner.

label: Apocalypse Fire Max
notes: Fire Max Lingering dominant — fire tornado fills the screen. Same structure as the Insane winner.

label: Terra Explosive Fracture
notes: Multi-block artillery+bouncer. Fracture pillars + massive explosive.

label: Terra Status Bomb
notes: Heavy Alchemic + Hazardous status stacking.

label: Terra Radius Monster
notes: Expansive x50 + Wideload x25. Damage Amp x100 + Merciless x50.

label: Terra Balanced Power
notes: Balanced 25x across 6 perks + trailing lingering.

label: Terra MIRV Balanced
notes: Balanced 25x + Tightly Packed x50. MIRV chaos with even damage.

label: Terra MIRV Army
notes: MIRV x150 + Tightly Packed x100 + Micro MIRV x50. Exponential multiplication.

label: Terra Balanced Fire
notes: Balanced + Fire Lingering (34).

label: Terra Balanced Shock
notes: Balanced + Shock Lingering (36).

label: Terra Balanced Radiation
notes: Balanced + Radiation Lingering (38).

label: Terra Balanced Cryo
notes: Balanced + Cryo Lingering (37).

label: Terra Radius Corrosive
notes: Radius Monster + Corrosive Lingering.

label: Terra Radius Shock
notes: Radius Monster + Shock Lingering.
